name: Daniel Fischer
description: Daniel Fischer is a 70-year-old active retiree in Germany who wants to stay independent and physically active well into later life. With a middle income and low digital fluency, he prefers proven, clinically backed products and values pharmacist advice. Health priorities include Healthy Aging, Preventative Care, Heart Health. He prefers daily supplements, at-home diagnostic kits, shops mainly via pharmacies and trusted health retailers, and spends roughly 1190 per year. Risk tolerance toward new products is conservative.
